site.title: Blues Calendar Taiwan
site.subtitle: A board for Blues classes, socials, workshops, and event announcements in Taiwan.
site.description: A community board for Blues dancers in Taiwan.

home.guideDescription: From weekly classes and short workshops to socials and major events, find the way you want to join the Blues community.

category.classDescription: Weekly classes for dancers who want to learn and practice consistently.
category.workshopDescription: Short-term topic classes, guest teacher sessions, intensives, and focused training.
category.socialDescription: Dance nights, practice sessions, live band events, and social dancing gatherings.
category.eventDescription: Major events, cross-city gatherings, festivals, and Blues travel.

event.reportTitle: Something wrong with the event info?
event.reportDescription: If the time, venue, price, registration link, or content is incorrect, please help report it.

calendar.title: All Blues Events
calendar.description: A list of Blues classes, workshops, socials, and events in Taiwan.
